entries.name: mui:theming
entries.intent: MUI theming — createTheme, palette, typography, dark mode, TypeScript augmentation, component overrides

entries.name: mui:sx-styled
entries.intent: MUI sx prop and styled() API — responsive values, pseudo-selectors, performance

entries.name: mui:components
entries.intent: MUI core component patterns — inputs, display, navigation, feedback, surfaces

entries.name: mui:data-grid
entries.intent: MUI X DataGrid — columns, sorting, filtering, pagination, editing, server-side, virtualization

entries.name: mui:date-pickers
entries.intent: MUI X Date/Time Pickers — DatePicker, TimePicker, DateRangePicker, LocalizationProvider, slots

entries.name: mui:forms-validation
entries.intent: MUI forms — React Hook Form, Formik, Zod/Yup, FormControl, multi-step Stepper, accessibility

entries.name: mui:layout-responsive
entries.intent: MUI layout — Grid v2, Stack, Container, Box, useMediaQuery, breakpoints, responsive design

entries.name: mui:accessibility
entries.intent: MUI accessibility — ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, WCAG compliance, color contrast

entries.name: mui:performance
entries.intent: MUI performance — tree-shaking, bundle size, sx memoization, SSR, Next.js, virtualization

entries.name: mui:migration
entries.intent: MUI migration — v4→v5, v5→v6, codemods, makeStyles→styled/sx, breaking changes
